languages.text: {n}Зораэль указывает на статуи из {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}жесткого света{/g}, расставленные вокруг.{/n} "Эти платформы переносят объекты в верхние галереи. Ты можешь попасть туда, взобравшись на одну из них. Ступай и бейся с доблестью, человек".

traits.locale_text: {n}Зораэль указывает на статуи из {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}жесткого света{/g}, расставленные вокруг.{/n} "Эти платформы переносят объекты в верхние галереи. Ты можешь попасть туда, взобравшись на одну из них. Ступай и бейся с доблестью, человек".
traits.speaker: Blood_Raven

languages.text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."
languages.original_text: {n}Зораэль указывает на статуи из {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}жесткого света{/g}, расставленные вокруг.{/n} "Эти платформы переносят объекты в верхние галереи. Ты можешь попасть туда, взобравшись на одну из них. Ступай и бейся с доблестью, человек".

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

{n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

"There is only one path leading out of the hall that is suitable for humans." {n}Victus points to one of the light statues.{/n} "This platform will take you to the upper galleries. I believe that is where the goal you seek is located. Go, and may the Emperor watch over you."

{n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You and your companions can use them to get there. Go, and fulfil your duty, human."

{n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You and your companions can use them to get there. Go, and fulfil your duty, human."

{n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

{n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

languages.text: 「この大広間から人間が通れる道は一つだけ。この光る像のそばに道がある。このプラットフォームは上階へ通じる。君が求めるゴールは上階にあるだろう。行け、皇帝が君を見守るであろう」{n}{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is only one path leading out of the hall that is suitable for humans." {n}Victus points to one of the light statues.{/n} "This platform will take you to the upper galleries. I believe that is where the goal you seek is located. Go, and may the Emperor watch over you."

traits.locale_text: 「この大広間から人間が通れる道は一つだけ。この光る像のそばに道がある。このプラットフォームは上階へ通じる。君が求めるゴールは上階にあるだろう。行け、皇帝が君を見守るであろう。」

languages.text: {n}Zorael señala a una de las estatuas de {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}luz sólida{/g}.{/n} «Estas plataformas transportan objetos a las galerías superiores. Tus compañeros y tú podéis usarlas para llegar ahí. Ve y lucha valientemente, human{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael señala a una de las estatuas de {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}luz sólida{/g}.{/n} «Estas plataformas transportan objetos a las galerías superiores. Tus compañeros y tú podéis usarlas para llegar ahí. Ve y lucha valientemente, human{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: {n}Zorael deutet auf eine der Statuen aus {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}Hartlicht{/g}.{/n} "Diese Plattformen transportieren Objekte auf die oberen Galerien. Über sie könnt ihr sie erreichen. Geht und kämpft ehrenhaft, Mensch."
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael deutet auf eine der Statuen aus {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}Hartlicht{/g}.{/n} "Diese Plattformen transportieren Objekte auf die oberen Galerien. Über sie könnt ihr sie erreichen. Geht und kämpft ehrenhaft, Mensch."

languages.text: {n}Zorael désigne l'une des statues en {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}lumière solide{/g}.{/n} « Ces plateformes servent au transport des objets vers les galeries supérieures. Vous pouvez les atteindre en empruntant le même chemin. Allez, {mf|humain|humaine}, et battez-vous vaillamment. »
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael désigne l'une des statues en {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}lumière solide{/g}.{/n} « Ces plateformes servent au transport des objets vers les galeries supérieures. Vous pouvez les atteindre en empruntant le même chemin. Allez, {mf|humain|humaine}, et battez-vous vaillamment. »

languages.text: {n}佐拉尔朝其中一尊{g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}硬光{/g}雕像示意了一下。{/n}“这些平台会把物品运往上层展厅。你可以借助它们抵达上层。去吧，人类，奋勇作战吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}佐拉尔朝其中一尊{g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}硬光{/g}雕像示意了一下。{/n}“这些平台会把物品运往上层展厅。你可以借助它们抵达上层。去吧，人类，奋勇作战吧。”

languages.text: {n}Zorael, {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}katı ışıktan{/g} heykellerden birini işaret ediyor.{/n} "Bu platformlar, nesneleri üst galerilere taşır. Bunlardan birine çıkarak oraya ulaşabilirsin. Git ve cesurca savaş insan."
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael gestures to one of the {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard-light{/g} statues.{/n} "These platforms transport objects to the upper galleries. You may reach them by ascending one of these. Go forth and do battle with valour, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael, {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}katı ışıktan{/g} heykellerden birini işaret ediyor.{/n} "Bu platformlar, nesneleri üst galerilere taşır. Bunlardan birine çıkarak oraya ulaşabilirsin. Git ve cesurca savaş insan."
